results.search_query: web: arxiv logistics fraud ecommerce delivery risk detection machine learning
attempted_queries: web: arxiv logistics fraud ecommerce delivery risk detection machine learning

papers.title: Detecting organized eCommerce fraud using scalable categorical clustering
papers.abstract: Detects organized fraud in online retail by clustering bulk orders from real-world Zalando ecommerce data; focuses on operational fraud detection at order scale.

papers.title: Explainable Fraud Detection with Deep Symbolic Classification
papers.abstract: An explainable fraud detection classifier with deep symbolic classification for financial and ecommerce-like transaction fraud, emphasizing transparency and imbalance robustness.

papers.title: Machine Learning for Fraud Detection in E-Commerce: A Research Agenda
papers.abstract: Fraud detection and prevention in e-commerce organizations; derives practical challenges and open research topics for anti-fraud operations in ecommerce.

results.search_query: web: arxiv marketing logistics ecommerce campaign demand fulfillment optimization
attempted_queries: web: arxiv marketing logistics ecommerce campaign demand fulfillment optimization

papers.title: EventCast: Hybrid Demand Forecasting in E-Commerce with LLM-Based Event Knowledge
papers.abstract: E-commerce demand forecasting for inventory planning and fulfillment scheduling during flash sales, holiday campaigns, seller incentives, and policy interventions; deployed in real-world industrial pipelines.

papers.title: Leveraging World Events to Predict E-Commerce Consumer Demand under Anomaly
papers.abstract: E-commerce consumer demand forecasting for supply chain optimization, advertisement placement, and delivery speed optimization using external event knowledge.

papers.title: PromotionLens: Inspecting Promotion Strategies of Online E-commerce via Visual Analytics
papers.abstract: Visual analytics for online e-commerce promotion strategies; combines multivariate time-series forecasting and what-if analysis for sales and promotional factors.

results.search_query: web: arxiv multi agent recommender systems ecommerce
attempted_queries: web: arxiv multi agent recommender systems ecommerce

papers.title: A Survey on LLM-powered Agents for Recommender Systems
papers.abstract: Survey of LLM-powered agents for recommender systems, including recommender-oriented, interaction-oriented, and simulation-oriented multi-agent frameworks.

papers.title: Whole-Chain Recommendations
papers.abstract: A multi-agent RL recommender approach for real e-commerce recommendation sessions, coordinating multiple recommendation strategies across entrance pages and item detail pages.

results.search_query: web: arxiv recommendation pricing ecommerce dynamic pricing recommender systems
attempted_queries: web: arxiv recommendation pricing ecommerce dynamic pricing recommender systems

papers.title: Dynamic pricing and assortment under a contextual MNL demand
papers.abstract: Dynamic multi-product pricing and assortment under contextual demand for online retail and advertising; uses online learning and contextual bandit methods.

papers.title: Context-Based Dynamic Pricing with Online Clustering
papers.abstract: Context-based dynamic pricing for online products with low sales, using clustering to transfer demand information across products; evaluated on Alibaba retail data.

papers.title: Dynamic pricing with Bayesian updates from online reviews
papers.abstract: Dynamic pricing with online reviews where firms update beliefs and make purchasing and pricing decisions; models the seller pricing problem as a bandit.
